title: The big search rewamp
author: enkelmedia
body_snippet:
After using mRemoteNG for a while I feel that my biggest "hurtle" is around opening the right connection fast.

There are several ideas on improvements like these

https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/2210
https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/1511
https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/2293

I think it would be a great idea to improve search in a couple of ways:

* Maybe there should be a "search dialog" (much like the powertoys search https://learn.microsoft.c...

iterations.description: Issue has no body describing what the search revamp entails, and the triage comment explicitly requests retesting on current build with reproducible steps before proceeding.
Bulk verified: commit d53b4327 exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `d53b4327` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** The big search rewamp

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes: AI triage (claude): Issue has no body describing what the search revamp entails, and the triage comment explicitly requests retesting on current build with reproducible steps before proceeding.
